name: nrf52840_nicenano_golden
description: nRF52840 nice!nano v1 Golden Test Suite — 15/15 PASS (2026-04-12). Stage0: UF2 blinky (visual) + USB CDC banner. Stage1: 6 on-chip self-tests (TEMP, RNG, TIMER0, RTC1, NVMC flash, AES-ECB), no external wiring. Stage2: peripheral loopback + radio (GPIO, UART, SPI, PWM+capture, SAADC, BLE beacon, IEEE 802.15.4). Flash via UF2 mass-storage (no SWD required). Observe via /dev/ttyACM0 USB CDC. Note: no onboard external SPI flash — nRF52840 internal flash only. I2C excluded (no 4.7kΩ pull-ups in standard bench setup).

stage2: P0.17 ↔ P0.20  (GPIO loopback / UART TX↔RX, left-col PIN6↔PIN5)
P0.31          (SAADC AIN7 — no wire, on-board VBATT divider)

excluded.nicenano_i2c_loopback: excluded — requires external 4.7kΩ pull-up resistors on P0.11+P1.04; not part of standard bench setup
